compliance.causality: VarLen + per-doc cu_seqlens, strict causal mask
compliance.normalized_softmax: full SP8192 vocab (lossless CaseOps), softcap then softmax
compliance.score_before_update: Phased TTT 3-phase score-first per-document LoRA (no_qv mask: K/MLP/O LoRA active, Q/V LoRA disabled), gd:0 prefix scoring under no_grad before LoRA grad steps, gd:1 suffix scoring
compliance.single_pass: each val token scored exactly once across all 3 phases

stack_components.base_pr1945_v21: PR #1908 base + AWQ-lite mixed-precision GPTQ + Asymmetric Logit Rescale (PR #1923) + WD=2.0 (PR #1886) - alertcat's own 5-1 record

stack_components.v22_innovation: EVAL_SEQ_LEN=2816 (vs PR #1953's 2560) — longer eval context lowered seed 42 pre-quant to 1.05952 (vs PR #1953's 1.06163). Net 3-seed improvement -0.00066 BPB vs V21 v2 (alertcat self), but 0.00022 BPB short of PR #1953 mean.
stack_components.tokenizer_pr1729_romeerp: sp8192 lossless caps caseops v1 reserved
